# API Checklist: Show Top Contributing Factors

**Purpose**: Validate API requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage for explanation output.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/015-top-contributing-factors/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are request/response schemas fully specified for success, qualitative-only, and unavailable explanation cases? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are response fields specified for top-N configuration, factor labels, units, and map context flags? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are contribution formats (currency vs normalized) explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK004 Are policy-based filtering and completeness notes explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK005 Do API requirements align with UI flow requirements for map context and qualitative labeling? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK006 Are requirements defined for API behavior when explanation is unavailable? [Coverage, Spec §Alternate Flows]
